300.name: Frog legs
300.desc: +1 movement range while wet. Water does not slow movement.

301.desc: Your basic attack has a 5% chance to Stun.

321.desc: Moving through water tiles costs 0 movement.

327.desc: Gain 2 random stat ups and 1 random stat down at the end of each turn.

331.desc: +1 movement range. Your movement action is a jump.

337.name: Floating Legs
337.desc: You are immune to tile effects.

343.name: Kitten Legs

754.desc: Your movement action is a jump. Your basic attack inflicts Bruise.
